source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #60
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. Atlas Theory posted a video about grinding your way to the top in Escape
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
VSUS Ambwe Review!!! Star Atlas Showroom
Gladiator posted a video reviewing the Star Atlas VSUS Ambwe.
MVN #93 Star Atlas Coordinated Treasure Hunt w/ Santi + DominicVain
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
Star Atlas : Escape Velocity tips tricks and tutorial SAGE Prequal
PockThePirate posted a video guide to Star Atlas SAGE: Escape Velocity.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #78
Aephia published their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas Escape Velocity data report
Star Atlas published a direct link to data about Escape Velocity.
STAR ATLAS – Grind Your Way To The TOP from $0!! (Zero to Hero)
Atlas Theory posted a video about grinding your way to the top in Escape Velocity.
Star Atlas Escape Velocity News!!
Beyond the Horizon 2620 posted a video about Escape Velocity news.
Prelude — A Galaxy in Movement: The First Day
Star Atlas published an article about a Star Atlas lore story.
MASSIVE Star Atlas Never Alone Campaign – $2 Million in Prizes
The Hologram News Network posted a video about the Star Atlas Never Alone social campaign.
Never Alone: A Shared Social Adventure Across the Star Atlas Galaxy
Star Atlas published an article about their social campaign.
Star Atlas News!
Beyond The Horizon 2620 posted a video about some Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Never Alone Mission 1: Scraps and Spoils Lore
The Hologram published an article about info from the Star Atlas Never Alone Mission 1.
STAR ATLAS – Let’s talk about NEVER ALONE campaign.
Atlas Theory posted a video about the Star Atlas Never Alone campaign.
!! Surge !! Escape Velocity & Never Alone Star Atlas
Gladiator posted a video about Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Factions and Lore For New Players
The Hologram posted a video about Star Atlas lore.
